title: Auto-Locking and Containment Policy
description: Risk Appetite Layer: Auto-trigger configurations for integration locking when risk thresholds are exceeded.

policy_id.description: Unique identifier for this containment policy

org_id.description: The tenant/economic entity this policy applies to

tcar_exposure_percent.description: Percentage of Total Capital at Risk that triggers this policy (e.g., 80%)

fraud_alert_severity.description: Minimum severity level of an aggregated fraud alert to trigger

lock_integrations.description: Automatically freeze external Webhooks, APIs, and ERP data ingestion

suspend_transactions.description: Halt operational transactions (e.g., carbon minting, EPCIS events)

requires_manual_override.description: If true, only Org Owner or Executive can lift the containment lock

auto_restore_on_threshold_drop.description: If true, integrations unlock automatically when risk drops below threshold
